name: Kafka Lab
description: Lab to learn and practice Apache Kafka concepts.
sideDescription: Lab to study event-driven messaging fundamentals with Apache Kafka.

studyTopics.title: Kafka fundamentals
studyTopics.description: Understand brokers, topics, partitions, and replication.

studyTopics.title: Producers and consumers
studyTopics.description: Practice event publishing and consumption with delivery guarantees.

studyTopics.title: Consumer groups
studyTopics.description: Explore load balancing and consumption parallelism.

studyTopics.title: Observability
studyTopics.description: Track metrics, lag, and cluster behavior in realistic scenarios.
